description: You are a technical artist preparing a 3D asset for export to a real-time game engine. Bake two 1024x1024 PNG texture maps for the 'BaseCube' object: an Ambient Occlusion map saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/baked_ao.png and a Diffuse Color map (capturing only the material color without lighting contribution) saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/baked_diffuse.png. Save the Blender project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bake_project.blend.
